input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.10 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.10
            TITLE: connectors

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.10: Connectors
EV.5.10 Connectors 
Tractive System connectors outside of a housing must meet one of the two: 
• Contain an Interlock EV.7.8 which must Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 
• Be sealed at Tech Inspection  IN.4.7.1

final_answer: rule EV.5.10: Connectors EV.5.10 Connectors Tractive System connectors outside of a housing must meet one of the two: • Contain an Interlock EV.7.8 which must Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 • Be sealed at Tech Inspection IN.4.7.1
